description: Bidirectional sync policy between Kyberion knowledge base and Cowork workspace. Governs tier mapping, promotion rules, and leakage prevention.

cowork_to_kyberion.description: Rules for ingesting Cowork work-folder artifacts into Kyberion memory-promotion-queue.

kind_inference.comment: Files matching SOP patterns are promoted as 'sop'

rules.comment: Paths under outputs/ or shared/ in Cowork are treated as public candidates
Paths containing customer/tenant names stay confidential

leakage_prevention.comment: Public-tier candidates must not reference confidential/personal paths (enforced by memory-promotion-queue).

idempotency.comment: A candidate with the same source_ref + content hash is not re-enqueued if already queued/promoted.

kyberion_to_cowork.description: Rules for supplying Kyberion knowledge to Cowork sessions.
kyberion_to_cowork.comment: Only public tier knowledge is supplied to Cowork. confidential/personal are never exposed.

feedback_loop.description: Trace-derived hints from Phase 5 Review are re-injected into Cowork knowledge supply.

conflict_resolution.comment: Conflicting updates are appended (newer wins for display) but overwriting promoted knowledge requires approval gate.
